evals.name: notification-model
evals.prompt: I need to add a new Notification model to the mi service with a foreign key to Member, and DAO methods to create one and list unread notifications
evals.expected_output: A notification.go model file and updated dao.go with CreateNotification and UnreadNotifications methods, following the existing DAO pattern

evals.name: many-to-many-events
evals.prompt: Add a many-to-many relationship between Events and Members so we can track who's attending each event
evals.expected_output: Updated Event model with Members association, a join table or GORM many2many tag, and DAO methods for adding/listing attendees

evals.name: new-service-postgres
evals.prompt: I'm starting a new service called logbook that needs to store entries in Postgres with GORM -- set up the models package with a DAO
evals.expected_output: A new cmd/logbook/models/ package with a DAO struct, Postgres connection, Entry model, and basic CRUD methods following the DAO pattern
